stories.title: Apple raises prices of MacBooks, iPads amid memory costs surge
stories.summary: Apple has increased prices across its MacBook and iPad lines as memory component costs skyrocket, driven in part by surging AI infrastructure demand for high-bandwidth memory chips.

stories.title: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
stories.summary: OpenKnowledge is a new open-source, AI-first knowledge management tool that aims to replace Obsidian and Notion with native LLM integration for organizing and retrieving personal knowledge.

stories.title: I built a GPU back end for Emacs
stories.summary: A developer details building a GPU-accelerated rendering backend for Emacs, leveraging modern graphics hardware to dramatically improve the editor's rendering performance.

stories.title: The unbearable cheapness of open weight models
stories.summary: An analysis of how the rapid proliferation of cheap open-weight AI models is disrupting the economics of the AI industry, putting pressure on closed-source providers and reshaping competitive dynamics.

stories.title: Political bias in AI: Where the AI models stand
stories.summary: Trakkr publishes benchmark results measuring political bias across major AI models, sparking extensive debate about neutrality, training data influence, and the implications for AI governance.

stories.title: Qualcomm in talks to acquire Tenstorrent for $8-10B
stories.summary: Qualcomm is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire AI chip startup Tenstorrent for $8-10 billion, aiming to bolster its position against NVIDIA and AMD in the rapidly growing AI accelerator market.

stories.title: Google launches Agentic Resource Discovery Specification (ARDS)
stories.summary: Google introduces ARDS, an open standard backed by Microsoft, GitHub, NVIDIA, and Amazon that enables AI agents to autonomously discover and interact with web resources, marking a major step toward interoperable agentic AI.

stories.title: AI-designed vaccine passes first human trials
stories.summary: Researchers at the University of Cambridge announced that an AI-designed vaccine has successfully completed initial human trials — the first time a vaccine's key component was designed entirely by artificial intelligence.

stories.title: The annotated PyTorch training loop
stories.summary: A detailed, annotated walkthrough of the PyTorch training loop explaining each step from data loading to optimization, aimed at helping ML practitioners understand what happens under the hood.

stories.title: Claude Opus 4.7 speeds robodog programming 20x vs human teams
stories.summary: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7 demonstrated a 20x speedup in programming robotic dogs compared to the best human teams using previous models, showcasing dramatic improvements in AI-assisted robotics development.
